name: Anixa Biosciences Inc
summary: PART I Overview Anixa Biosciences, Inc. is a biotechnology company developing therapies and vaccines that are focused on critical unmet needs in oncology. Our therapeutics program consists of the development of liraltagene autoleucel (lira-cel), a chimeric endocrine receptor-T cell therapy, which is a novel form of chimeric antigen receptor-T cell (CAR-T) technology, initially focused on treating ovarian cancer, that is being developed at our subsidiary, Certainty Therapeutics, Inc. (Certainty)....
